printed.name: Backstroke
printed.setup: Lying supine on Long Box, shoulders over back edge, chest lifted, legs in tabletop position, arms bent, elbows wide, hands in straps, fingers touching (palms facing up), hands opposite forehead and above sternum, eyes focused forward

movement.inhale: Straighten arms and legs to ceiling, externally rotate hips
movement.exhale: Circle arms out and around to sides, simultaneously circle legs out, around and together
